rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre; avg £531 (~$670); outside centre avg £417 (~$525)

utilities.note: electric + heating + water + internet; avg £119 (~$150) for 85m2

groceries.note: home cooking; Cluj affordable for food

diningOut.note: student city vibe; lots of cheap options

transit.note: bus/tram monthly pass; walkable old town

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; growing IT hub with several spaces

simData.note: Romanian SIM; Digi cheapest; fast LTE

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. University city; slight summer dip.

evidence.claim: 1BR city centre avg £531 (~$670); outside centre avg £417 (~$525)
evidence.quote: Renting a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre costs an additional £531 on average. Outside the Centre: The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment outside the centre is £417

evidence.claim: overall monthly costs ~£1,107 (~$1,400) per person; utilities avg £119 for 85m2
evidence.quote: You can expect to spend around £1,107 per month for 1 person. Basic utilities in Cluj-Napoca cost an average of £119 per month

evidence.claim: nomad budget $1,000–$1,800/mo typical; Cluj is growing IT hub
evidence.quote: for digital nomads in Cluj-Napoca, a monthly budget of around $1,000 to $1,800 is typical

evidence.claim: Cluj digital nomad guide: vibrant community, good internet, affordable vs. Bucharest
evidence.quote: digital nomads in Cluj-Napoca: your ultimate guide
